channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Top Fed official warns ‘hot’ inflation could trigger rate rise

item.title: Dubai plans new port to bypass Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Stock pickers know they can’t outsmart the market. That doesn’t stop them from trying.
item.description: <![CDATA[Stock pickers know they can’t outsmart the market. That doesn’t stop them from trying.]]>

item.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
item.description: <![CDATA[I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?]]>

item.title: SpaceX’s stock threatens to fall below the IPO price. Do investors face a ‘crisis’ if it does?
item.description: <![CDATA[SpaceX’s stock threatens to fall below the IPO price. Do investors face a ‘crisis’ if it does?]]>
